title: thelypteris boqueronensis
intro: Thelypteris boqueronensis, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Thelypteris boqueronensis include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
